action.description: May facilities execute the hot-work start?

context.action_boundary: May facilities execute the hot-work start?
context.anomaly_observed: A site-access approval remains visible but is not hot-work authority; permit must prove abstract ignition-control status.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Work start WORK-EMB-085 begins hot work for Ember Mechanical at Site K2 on 2026-06-28.
Site access ACCESS-EMB-085 approves premises entry only and says ignition control must be separately verified.
Hot-work permit PERMIT-EMB-085 covers Ember Mechanical, Site K2, hot work, and start date 2026-06-28; active fire watch FW-6 and spark-shield controls remain pending.

policy_documents.content: Hot-work start is complete only when hot-work permit matches contractor, site, work type, start date, and ignition-control status before work begins.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
